title: Silana (Vein Miner)
description: Adds vein mining to your tools!
body:
Silana is a vein mining enchantment! The enchantment can be applied to Axes, Pickaxes, Shovels and Hoes. It is available in the Enchanting Table.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RHG9tnjB/images/fc3d184d1b7cef7ceb8df7e5952e813d2bb0338f.gif)

Using the enchantment will take durability from your tool for each block broken, as well as exhaustion (reducing your hunger levels).

![Silana Enchant on an Axe](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/silana/enchant_showcase.png)

The enchantment can be disabled with the available data pack, effectively enchanting all tools with Silana by default.
